summary: Full end-to-end review of SafeWalk Mumbai MVP (backend + frontend). Backend: 17/17 pytest tests PASS covering health, mock OTP send/verify, users CRUD (create/get/patch with _id excluded), SOS create+cancel+respond+simulate-response, ratings + community pin aggregation, and all 5 helplines. Frontend: full onboarding (welcome -> language switch EN/HI/MR -> phone -> OTP 123456 -> profile w/ 3 contacts + volunteer opt-in) works and lands on Walking Mode home. Home renders stylised map, walking-alone toggle, legend chips, discreet button and giant SOS button. 3-second press-and-hold on SOS navigates to /sos-active with pulsing red bg, 10s cancel countdown, 4 mocked volunteers rendering with avatars/name/distance/ETA, contacts-notified section, and cancel returning to home. Community: 1-5 stars tappable, tag chips toggleable, submit adds a pin (pin count went from 0 to 2). Helplines: 5 cards render (Nirbhaya 1091, Mumbai Police 100, Bandra WPS, Andheri WPS, Ambulance 108) with tel: Call buttons. Profile: language switcher persists, edit contacts control present, logout returns user to onboarding welcome screen. Discreet mode: music-player disguise renders and tapping play 3× correctly triggers SOS (lands on /sos-active). All mocked flows (OTP=123456, 4 nearby volunteers, SMS not really sent, web audio recording no-op) behave per spec. No React Native red screen. No deprecated Expo packages detected. Minor non-blocking web warnings only ('shadow*' and 'pointerEvents' deprecation on react-native-web).

react_native_issues.issue: react-native-web warns 'shadow*' style props are deprecated; use boxShadow (or platform-guarded styles). Reference: /app/frontend/app/onboarding.tsx:426-429 and other files using shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset. Not blocking on native.

react-native-web warns props.pointerEvents is deprecated; move to style.pointerEvents. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/home.tsx LinearGradient usages (topGradient/bottomGradient with pointerEvents='none').

action_items: (Cosmetic) Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow (or use Platform.select) to silence react-native-web deprecation warnings.
(Cosmetic) Move pointerEvents from prop to style on LinearGradient overlays in (tabs)/home.tsx.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py cleanly excludes MongoDB _id in all responses (uses find with {_id:0} projections and a clean() helper).
All backend endpoints under /api prefix, use env vars (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME) with no defaults — good.
Frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL via src/api/client.ts — good.
All interactive elements carry testID as advertised; every screen has data-testid coverage.
seed_data_creation: Created test user TEST_Aditi_UI with phone +919999999999 (via UI) and TEST_Aditi user via pytest with random unique phone. Created 2 ratings at Marine Drive lat/lng producing 1 aggregated pin (later incremented). No cleanup performed (MVP mock data — safe).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_safewalk_api.py — reuse for regression. Note: OTP is always 123456; any +91 phone works. If re-testing UI with the same phone +919999999999, verify-OTP will return is_new=false and skip the profile step — the onboarding flow correctly handles both paths. The 'walking-toggle' selector may show as 2 matches on the DOM (react-native-web renders both mobile+desktop variants); use .first or navigate via URL rather than clicking tab labels.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in reviewed features.
